source.note: real seeded app via apps-container + reverse tunnel; deterministic container grade

task.en: Open HangryDash, the food delivery app at http://localhost:3007 (it is already open in Safari and you are logged in). Go to your order history, find one of your past delivered orders from Cooper's Seafood House, and leave it a 5-star review with this exact comment: "Best baby back ribs in all of Scranton, would order weekly."
